description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C++ that runs on workflow dispatch, push to main, and pull requests to main. The workflow has two jobs, clang-format and clang-tidy, both running on ubuntu-24.04. The clang-format job checks out the repository, installs Clang Format 19, and runs it on C++ files. The clang-tidy job checks out the repository, sets up C++, installs clang-tidy 19 and bear, builds the project with bear, and runs clang-tidy on C++ files.
